step_rationale: Pattern-recognition receptor; lectin-complement pathway; AMI biomarker with causal risk; elevated in exosomes.
mechanism: Ficolin-2 recognizes danger-associated patterns, activating complement and promoting plaque inflammation during acute MI.

references.title: Proteomics Analysis of Five Potential Plasma-derived Exosomal Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Identification of Cardiometabolic Protein Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction Using Olink Proteomics.
Factors of Long-Term Prognosis for Cardiovascular Complications in Patients After Acute Myocardial Infarction, Based on the Plasma Proteome.
Characterization of differentially expressed plasma proteins in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
